name: Commercial Tree Work Contract
scope: Tree services for commercial properties, HOAs, municipalities, and corporate clients.

sections.title: Scope of Work
sections.body: Contractor will perform tree work as described in the attached commercial scope, including removals, pruning, debris cleanup, and stump grinding.

sections.title: Insurance Requirements
sections.body: Contractor maintains liability insurance and workers compensation. Certificates available upon request.

sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.body: Net 30 unless otherwise agreed. Late fees may apply.

sections.title: Site Rules
sections.body: Contractor will follow all site safety rules, parking restrictions, and HOA guidelines.
